TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: wani' galan ta skbaley tokan wani' kwe, iyat haca nana yow na skblayan ta, ba'un skbalay kiri' uy. bway na wani' ga, mngihuy iyal niqun.
S.PHON: waniʔ ɣalan ta s~ɕkβalej tokan waniʔ kwe, ijat ħaʦ~ʨa nana jow na s~ɕkβlajan ta, βaʔun s~ɕkβalaj kiriʔ uj. βwaj na waniʔ ɣa, mŋiħuj ijal niqun.
S.FORM: wani' galan ta skbaley tokan wani' kwe, iyat haca nana yow na skblayan ta, ba'un skbalay kiri' uy. bway na wani' ga, mngihuy iyal niqun.
S.PHON: waniʔ ɣalan ta s~ɕkβalej tokan waniʔ kwe, ijat ħaʦ~ʨa nana jow na s~ɕkβlajan ta, βaʔun s~ɕkβalaj kiriʔ uj. βwaj na waniʔ ɣa, mŋiħuj ijal niqun.
